name: video-template-hyperframes-website-to-video-promo
title: HyperFrames: Website-to-Video Pipeline (15-Second Marketing Cut)

title_i18n.zh-CN: HyperFrames：网站转视频工具（15秒营销片段）
title_i18n.zh-TW: HyperFrames：網站轉影片工具（15秒行銷片段）
title_i18n.ja: HyperFrames：ウェブサイト→動画変換パイプライン（15秒マーケティング版）
title_i18n.fr: HyperFrames : Pipeline site web vers vidéo (extrait marketing 15 secondes)
title_i18n.es: HyperFrames: Pipeline de sitio web a vídeo (corte de marketing de 15 segundos)
title_i18n.pt-BR: HyperFrames: Pipeline de site para vídeo (corte de marketing de 15 segundos)
title_i18n.it: HyperFrames: Pipeline da sito web a video (taglio marketing da 15 secondi)
title_i18n.vi: HyperFrames: Quy trình chuyển website thành video (clip marketing 15 giây)
title_i18n.ar: HyperFrames: خط أنابيب تحويل الموقع إلى فيديو (مقطع تسويقي 15 ثانية)
title_i18n.tr: HyperFrames: Web Sitesinden Videoya Akışı (15 Saniyelik Pazarlama Klibi)

description: A 15-second 16:9 HyperFrames composition that captures a live website at three viewport sizes, then animates between them with a chromatic radial split between scenes. Mirrors the hyperframes-sizzle student-kit archetype where the site is the source asset.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 15秒16:9 HyperFrames合成，在三种视口尺寸下捕获实时网站，并通过色差径向分割在场景间制作动画过渡。遵循hyperframes-sizzle学生套件原型，将网站作为源素材。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 15秒16:9 HyperFrames合成，在三種視口尺寸下擷取即時網站，並透過色差徑向分割在場景間製作動畫過渡。遵循hyperframes-sizzle學生套件原型，將網站作為來源素材。
description_i18n.ja: 3つのビューポートサイズでウェブサイトをキャプチャし、色収差ラジアル分割でシーン間をアニメーション遷移する15秒16:9のHyperFramesコンポジション。サイトをソースアセットとするhyperframes-sizzle学生キットのアーキタイプに準拠。
description_i18n.ko: 세 가지 뷰포트 크기로 라이브 웹사이트를 캡처하고 색수차 방사형 분할로 장면 간 애니메이션 전환하는 15초 16:9 HyperFrames 구성. 사이트를 소스 자산으로 사용하는 hyperframes-sizzle 학생 키트 아키타입을 따릅니다.
description_i18n.de: Eine 15-sekündige 16:9-HyperFrames-Komposition, die eine Live-Website in drei Viewport-Größen erfasst und mit chromatischer radialer Teilung zwischen Szenen animiert. Folgt dem hyperframes-sizzle-Student-Kit-Archetyp mit der Website als Quell-Asset.
description_i18n.fr: Composition HyperFrames 16:9 de 15 secondes capturant un site web en direct sur trois tailles de fenêtre, avec transitions animées par séparation radiale chromatique entre les scènes. Suit l'archétype hyperframes-sizzle student-kit où le site est l'actif source.
description_i18n.ru: 15-секундная композиция HyperFrames 16:9, которая захватывает живой сайт в трех размерах viewport и анимирует переходы между ними с хроматическим радиальным разделением сцен. Следует архетипу hyperframes-sizzle student-kit, где сайт является исходным ресурсом.
description_i18n.es: Composición HyperFrames de 15 segundos en 16:9 que captura un sitio web en tres tamaños de viewport y anima entre ellos con división radial cromática entre escenas. Sigue el arquetipo hyperframes-sizzle student-kit donde el sitio es el activo fuente.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Composição HyperFrames 16:9 de 15 segundos que captura um site ao vivo em três tamanhos de viewport e anima entre eles com divisão radial cromática entre cenas. Segue o arquétipo hyperframes-sizzle student-kit onde o site é o ativo fonte.
description_i18n.it: Composizione HyperFrames 16:9 da 15 secondi che cattura un sito web live in tre dimensioni di viewport e anima tra di esse con divisione radiale cromatica tra le scene. Segue l'archetipo hyperframes-sizzle student-kit dove il sito è la risorsa sorgente.
description_i18n.vi: Thành phẩm HyperFrames 16:9 dài 15 giây chụp website trực tiếp ở ba kích thước khung nhìn, sau đó tạo hiệu ứng chuyển cảnh với hiệu ứng phân tách xuyên tâm sắc độ. Tuân theo nguyên mẫu hyperframes-sizzle student-kit với website là tài nguyên nguồn.
description_i18n.pl: 15-sekundowa kompozycja HyperFrames 16:9, która przechwytuje aktywną stronę w trzech rozmiarach viewport i animuje przejścia między nimi z chromatycznym radialnym podziałem scen. Wzorowana na archetypie hyperframes-sizzle student-kit, gdzie strona jest zasobem źródłowym.
description_i18n.id: Komposisi HyperFrames 16:9 berdurasi 15 detik yang menangkap situs web langsung dalam tiga ukuran viewport, lalu menganimasikan di antaranya dengan pemisahan radial kromatik antar adegan. Mengikuti arketipe hyperframes-sizzle student-kit di mana situs adalah aset sumber.
description_i18n.nl: Een 15-seconden 16:9 HyperFrames-compositie die een live website vastlegt in drie viewport-formaten en deze animeert met een chromatische radiale splitsing tussen scènes. Volgt het hyperframes-sizzle student-kit archetype waarbij de site het bronmateriaal is.
description_i18n.ar: تركيبة HyperFrames بنسبة 16:9 لمدة 15 ثانية تلتقط موقع ويب مباشر بثلاثة أحجام عرض، ثم تنشئ الرسوم المتحركة بينها بفاصل شعاعي لوني بين المشاهد. يتبع نموذج hyperframes-sizzle student-kit حيث الموقع هو الأصل المصدر.
description_i18n.tr: Canlı bir web sitesini üç görüntü alanı boyutunda yakalayan ve sahneler arası kromatik radyal bölme ile aralarında animasyon yapan 15 saniyelik 16:9 HyperFrames kompozisyonu. Sitenin kaynak varlık olduğu hyperframes-sizzle student-kit arketipini takip eder.
description_i18n.uk: 15-секундна композиція HyperFrames 16:9, яка захоплює живий сайт у трьох розмірах viewport та анімує переходи між ними з хроматичним радіальним поділом сцен. Слідує архетипу hyperframes-sizzle student-kit, де сайт є вихідним ресурсом.
description_i18n.en: A 15-second 16:9 HyperFrames composition that captures a live website at three viewport sizes, then animates between them with a chromatic radial split between scenes. Mirrors the hyperframes-sizzle student-kit archetype where the site is the source asset.

query.en: Build a 15-second HyperFrames marketing cut (1920×1080, 30fps) that turns a real website into a video. The pipeline: capture the site headlessly at three viewport sizes, drop the captures into the composition, animate between them. Pull `npx hyperframes add chromatic-radial-split`, `npx hyperframes add flash-through-white`, `npx hyperframes add logo-outro`. Use the website-to-video guide from the HF docs to capture the source frames into `assets/site-{desktop,tablet,mobile}.png` before authoring the timeline. Visual identity: cool canvas #0a0c12, off-white #f5f7fa, single accent #6cf3c0 on UI ring frames. Display: "General Sans" 96px for the kicker title, body "Inter" 22px for captions, mono "JetBrains Mono" 18px for url overlays. Tabular-nums on any digit row. Three scenes, 5s each, separated by transitions: Scene 1 (0–5s) DESKTOP — captured screenshot (1440×900) inside a stylized browser chrome (use the OD `assets/frames/browser-chrome.html` look as inspiration if available). The screenshot scales 1.04 → 1.0 over 0.7s ease expo.out, then a 1.5s slow Ken-Burns pan across its hero section. A monospace url chip in the top-left fades in at 1.0s. At 4.5s a kicker line types in below the frame. Transition at 5.0s → flash-through-white, 0.3s. Scene 2 (5.3–10s) TABLET — captured screenshot (1024×768) tilted slightly in 3D (rotateY=-8°) over the canvas, with the previous chrome floating off via the transition. Same Ken-Burns + url chip pattern. A second kicker line at 8.5s. Transition at 10.0s → chromatic-radial-split, 0.5s. Scene 3 (10.5–15s) MOBILE — captured screenshot (390×844) inside an iPhone-15-pro-like chrome, vertical, rotateY=+8°. Animated hand cursor taps once at 12.0s on the primary CTA region, with a small ripple ring expanding over 0.8s. At 13.5s the logo-outro block fires in the lower-right. Non-negotiables: never animate the dimensions of an directly — wrap each screenshot in a non-timed div and animate the wrapper; entrance-only motion; transitions handle scene exits; deterministic; all timelines paused:true; root data-duration=15. Run `npx hyperframes lint` and `npx hyperframes inspect --samples 15`. Output: `website-to-video-15s.mp4`.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build a 15-second HyperFrames marketing cut (1920×1080, 30fps) that turns a real website into a video. The pipeline: capture the site headlessly at three viewport sizes, drop the captures into the composition, animate between them. Pull `npx hyperframes add chromatic-radial-split`, `npx hyperframes add flash-through-white`, `npx hyperframes add logo-outro`. Use the website-to-video guide from the HF docs to capture the source frames into `assets/site-{desktop,tablet,mobile}.png` before authoring the timeline. Visual identity: cool canvas #0a0c12, off-white #f5f7fa, single accent #6cf3c0 on UI ring frames. Display: "General Sans" 96px for the kicker title, body "Inter" 22px for captions, mono "JetBrains Mono" 18px for url overlays. Tabular-nums on any digit row. Three scenes, 5s each, separated by transitions: Scene 1 (0–5s) DESKTOP — captured screenshot (1440×900) inside a stylized browser chrome (use the OD `assets/frames/browser-chrome.html` look as inspiration if available). The screenshot scales 1.04 → 1.0 over 0.7s ease expo.out, then a 1.5s slow Ken-Burns pan across its hero section. A monospace url chip in the top-left fades in at 1.0s. At 4.5s a kicker line types in below the frame. Transition at 5.0s → flash-through-white, 0.3s. Scene 2 (5.3–10s) TABLET — captured screenshot (1024×768) tilted slightly in 3D (rotateY=-8°) over the canvas, with the previous chrome floating off via the transition. Same Ken-Burns + url chip pattern. A second kicker line at 8.5s. Transition at 10.0s → chromatic-radial-split, 0.5s. Scene 3 (10.5–15s) MOBILE — captured screenshot (390×844) inside an iPhone-15-pro-like chrome, vertical, rotateY=+8°. Animated hand cursor taps once at 12.0s on the primary CTA region, with a small ripple ring expanding over 0.8s. At 13.5s the logo-outro block fires in the lower-right. Non-negotiables: never animate the dimensions of an directly — wrap each screenshot in a non-timed div and animate the wrapper; entrance-only motion; transitions handle scene exits; deterministic; all timelines paused:true; root data-duration=15. Run `npx hyperframes lint` and `npx hyperframes inspect --samples 15`. Output: `website-to-video-15s.mp4`.
